title: kyllinga nervosa subsp. oblonga
intro: Kyllinga nervosa subsp. oblonga is a type of aquatic plant, also known as a sedge, that is commonly found in wetlands and shallow water areas. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kyllinga nervosa subsp. oblonga include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and microbial infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
